name: Supabase
description: Monitor Supabase projects for security configuration, MFA, secrets, edge functions, SSL enforcement, backups, and compliance advisories. Requires a Management API access token (not your project anon or service key). Generate at supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens
2. Click Generate New Token
3. Give it a name (e.g. CompAI)
4. Copy the token and paste it below

Important: Use a Management API access token, not your project anon or service key.

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all Supabase projects and verifies they are in a healthy active state

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Verifies SSL is enforced on the Supabase database connection, requiring TLS for all client connections

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies multi-factor authentication (TOTP) is enabled for user enrollment and verification in Supabase Auth

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Audits Supabase Auth configuration: JWT expiry, auto-confirm, password policy, and HaveIBeenPwned protection

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Audits Edge Function security configuration — verifies JWT verification is enabled and all functions are in active state

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Edge Function secrets are configured. Only secret names are surfaced — values are never stored or displayed.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Edge Function execution logging is accessible and active via the Supabase Analytics API

checks.name: Backup Logs
checks.description: Verifies database backups are configured and recent successful backups exist. Checks for Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR) enablement.

checks.name: Internal Security Audit
checks.description: Surfaces Supabase's built-in security advisor results — automated lint checks for RLS, leaked keys, network restrictions, SSL, and 28 other security rules

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies that Supabase projects use encryption at rest (enabled by default on all Supabase databases)
